seo.title: The Venue | Rooftop, Courtyard & Indoor Bar | PRK 101
seo.description: Park 101's multi-level venue in Carlsbad Village — rooftop deck, open-air courtyard with LED wall, indoor bar, and dog-friendly spaces.

hero.heading:
Rooftop. Courtyard.
Indoor Bar.
hero.body: Three distinct spaces under one open sky. The central courtyard with the massive LED wall, the elevated rooftop deck, and the indoor bar with wall-to-wall screens — one block from the beach.

final.heading: Park 101 Awaits.
final.body: One block from the beach in Carlsbad Village. Open daily.
